title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: rhel-drivers bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for rhel-drivers is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: Provides an installer script for installing GPU/AI drivers.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): rhel-drivers: Typo in nvidia-fabric-manager-devel package name (JIRA:RHEL-127924)
affected_products: Red Hat Enterprise Linux for IBM z Systems
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86_64 10 x86_64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for ARM 64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for Power, little endian

fixes.description: rhel-drivers: Typo in nvidia-fabric-manager-devel package name

full_text:
An update for rhel-drivers is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

Provides an installer script for installing GPU/AI drivers.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): rhel-drivers: Typo in nvidia-fabric-manager-devel package name (JIRA:RHEL-127924)
